Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The QueueDataTransfer method schedules a transfer from one IDataArray to another, within GPU memory.

Note.Paragraph: Data transfer operations are scheduled work. When an ITransferBatch is supplied, the transfer follows the synchronization rules for that batch.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: SuccessToken QueueDataTransfer(IDataArray* targetBuffer, size_t transferCountInBytes, size_t sourceBufferOffsetInBytes = 0, size_t targetBufferOffsetInBytes = 0, ITransferBatch* transferBatch = nullptr);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The destination buffer for the GPU-side transfer.
The number of bytes to transfer.
The source byte offset where the transfer begins.
The destination byte offset where the transfer begins.
An optional transfer batch to schedule the transfer into. If null, the renderer schedules the transfer independently.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if the operation succeeded, false otherwise. An assertion will be raised in debug builds if the result is not tested.
